title: Free Health Check-up Camp Organized in Burdwan
summary: VAF organized a free health check-up camp serving over 300 families with basic health screenings, medicines, and doctor consultations.
content: In partnership with local doctors and health workers, our team set up a full-day health camp providing free check-ups, basic medicine distribution, and maternal health guidance to underserved families in the Burdwan region.

title: Career Guidance Session for Students
summary: A career guidance workshop was held for secondary school students, helping them understand career pathways and skill development options.
content: Volunteers and mentors guided over 80 students through career planning, higher education options, and digital skills, empowering the next generation to make informed decisions about their future.

title: Cleanliness Drive Brings Community Together
summary: Community members and VAF volunteers came together for a cleanliness and waste segregation drive along the riverside.
content: Our cleanliness drive engaged local residents in cleaning public spaces and learning proper waste segregation, promoting a cleaner and healthier environment for the entire community.

title: Tree Plantation Drive - Green Tomorrow Initiative
summary: Over 300 native saplings were planted as part of our ongoing Green Tomorrow Initiative for a greener future.
content: Volunteers, students, and community members joined hands to plant native saplings, with local schools adopting saplings to nurture through the year as part of our environmental conservation mission.

title: Skill Development Training for Women
summary: A vocational skill development program was launched to empower women with tailoring and craft-making skills for sustainable livelihoods.
content: Our skill development center trained women in tailoring, handicrafts, and financial literacy, helping them build independent livelihoods and strengthen their families' economic standing.

title: Free Medicine Distribution Camp
summary: Essential medicines were distributed free of cost to elderly and underprivileged community members.
content: In our continued healthcare mission, VAF distributed essential medicines and provided health guidance to elderly residents and families who lack regular access to medical care.
